ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_description" TEXT /* Description of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is part of */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match combination */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the player played in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target made by the player in the match */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target made by the player in the match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player in the match */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player in kilometers */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the match */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the player's performance in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "round_description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the round starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the round ends */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches in the round */,
  "round_status" TEXT /* Status of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)
